text: As I stand here in this brightly lit, modern space, the glowing blue lights and vibrant colors seem to amplify a sense of exposure within me. The world outside the glass feels distant and disconnected. Interpretive text on the wall reminds me of the tension between intention and perception, making me reflect on moments when I have felt misunderstood or unseen. There's both curiosity and discomfort woven into my thoughts. I am compelled to question how we connect with others in open spaces, and whether true understanding is ever fully attainable. The environment pushes me gently toward introspection and vulnerability.
